creator: Lauren Forristal
title: (No AI) AI Dungeon maker Latitude unveils Voyage, a platform for creating AI-powered RPGs
dc:creator: Lauren Forristal
content: Latitude's new AI-native platform, Voyage, aims to help gamers create their very own role-playing game.
contentSnippet: Latitude's new AI-native platform, Voyage, aims to help gamers create their very own role-playing game.

creator: Lucas Ropek
title: (No AI) Bond, a new social media platform, wants to use AI to help you kick your doomscrolling habit
dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
content: Bond wants you to get off the couch and get back into the real world, its creator says. The new platform's AI system is designed to motivate users to do things away from the app.
contentSnippet: Bond wants you to get off the couch and get back into the real world, its creator says. The new platform's AI system is designed to motivate users to do things away from the app.

title: (No AI) Ordering with the Starbucks ChatGPT app was a true coffee nightmare
author: David Pierce
content:
![A screenshot showing the Starbucks ChatGPT experience.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/Starbucks-App-in-ChatGPT.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

You just cannot convince me this is how people order coffee. | Image: Starbucks

Venti iced coffee, light skim milk. That's what I get at Starbucks. It is what I have gotten at Starbucks every time I've been to Starbucks for as long as I can remember, other than a brief love affair with the caffe misto a few years ago. In person, my brain barely needs to activate to say the words aloud; in the app, it's four taps and I'm ready to go.

My first time ordering Starbucks through its new ChatGPT integration, [which launched last week](https://about.starbucks.com/press/2026/a-new-way-to-inspire-your-starbucks-order/), was comparatively a complete mess. Getting started is easy enough, if not exactly obvious: Just open ChatGPT and type "@Starbucks" plus your order. You can probably guess what happens next, right …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/915821/starbucks-chatgpt-app-testing)

title: (No AI) John Ternus’ first big problem is AI
author: Hayden Field
content:
![Photo collage of John](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/JohnTernus.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Less than a year ago, Apple made headlines for a lack of AI announcements at its annual WWDC event. Ten months later, the company has announced that hardware executive John Ternus will succeed longtime CEO Tim Cook as chief executive - and the official release doesn't mention AI once.

Ternus, currently Apple's SVP of hardware engineering, will take over as CEO on September 1st, after Cook's decade and a half in the role. Ternus is a 25-year veteran of the company and the first Apple CEO in about 30 years to come from the hardware sector. According to Apple, he's led hardware engineering work for every model of iPad, as well as the most rec …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/915662/john-ternus-apple-ceo-tim-cook-ai-problem-siri)

title: (No AI) Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
content: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.
contentSnippet: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.

title: (No AI) OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
content: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.
contentSnippet: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

title: (No AI) Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
content: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

creator: Ej Dickson
title: (No AI) This Scammer Used an AI-Generated MAGA Girl to Grift ‘Super Dumb’ Men
dc:creator: Ej Dickson
content: A med student says he’s made thousands of dollars selling photos and videos of a young conservative woman he created using generative tools. He’s not alone.
contentSnippet: A med student says he’s made thousands of dollars selling photos and videos of a young conservative woman he created using generative tools. He’s not alone.

creator: Javier Carbajal
title: (No AI) A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
dc:creator: Javier Carbajal
content: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.
contentSnippet: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.
